MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Francisco Torres for John Stewart Company, who is present.
Alecia Cotton for Gensan Madayag, who is present.

Settlement conference held. Parties entered into a signed agreement, which is filed with the court. Settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 51 Sixth Street, # 705, San Francisco, CA.

JPT Barbara Ancher, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported. (218)
